stemHtml: Which statement is correct about EASA Implementing Rules?

options.a: They are binding in their entirety, used to ensure a high and uniform level of safety and compliance. They are adopted by the European Commission in the form of regulations.
options.b: They are non-binding technical standards adopted by EASA to meet the essential requirements of the Basic Regulation.
options.c: They are binding explanatory and interpretive material on how to meet the requirements in the Basic Regulation, IRs, AMCs, and CSs.
options.d: They are non-binding special detailed technical specifications determined by the NAA for an aerodrome.
